_comment: Logistics, transportation, household, and errand tasks. Categories: transportation, household, admin, errand. Fields: title, category, priority (critical/important/light), due_day (weekday name), due_date (YYYY-MM-DD), owner, status (pending/done/overdue), notes, tags (list).

items.title: Review Sarah's weekly schedule
items.notes: Review full week calendar — confirm all commitments, check for conflicts.

items.title: Determine car share plan for the week
items.notes: Figure out who has the car when. Identify gaps where Sarah needs a ride.

items.title: Resolve Monday transportation conflict
items.notes: Monday scheduling often has conflicts between Sarah's activities and other obligations. Pre-resolve.

items.title: Schedule car A/C estimate
items.notes: Car A/C not working well. Get estimate from Firestone or similar before summer.

items.title: Take out trash
items.notes: Trash pickup is Tuesday morning. Put bin out Monday night.

items.title: Bring in trash bin
items.notes: Bring bin back in after pickup.

items.title: Weekly mail sort
items.notes: Go through accumulated mail. File, act on, or discard.

items.title: Review household bills and auto-payments
items.notes: Monthly review of bills, subscriptions, and auto-pay amounts.

items.title: Pharmacy pickup
items.notes: Pick up any ready prescriptions mid-week.

items.title: Grocery store run (supplemental)
items.notes: Fill in fresh items not covered by the grocery bot order.
